question: Design a `Book` class that encapsulates attributes like `title`, `author`, and `isbn` (all strings). Include a constructor to initialize these attributes and a `displayInfo()` method to print all book details.

test_cases.input: The Hitchhiker's Guide to the Galaxy,Douglas Adams,978-0345391803
test_cases.expected:
Book Details:
  Title:  The Hitchhiker's Guide to the Galaxy
  Author: Douglas Adams
  ISBN:   978-0345391803

Book Details:
  Title:  1984
  Author: George Orwell
  ISBN:   978-0451524935

errors: The constructor takes C-style string pointers (`const char*`) but does not explicitly handle `nullptr` arguments. Constructing `std::string` from a `nullptr` `const char*` results in a `std::logic_error` (or crash), making the class non-robust to invalid C-style string inputs.
